overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic city during golden hour. The journey begins on an elevated highway passing industrial concrete structures, continues through a downtown corridor with large digital billboards and overhead gantries, and transitions into a lower residential zone with market tents and ruined buildings.

yellow vehicle passes quickly on the left side
passing the large cylindrical concrete structure on the right

futuristic skyscrapers with neon signs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway during golden hour, with a large cylindrical industrial structure dominating the right side. The camera moves forward past this structure while vehicles pass by on both sides. Overhead power lines stretch across the clear sky toward the distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach with palm tree median

events.description: vehicle with bright headlights approaches from the opposite direction
approaching large overhead gantry structure spanning the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway with palm trees visible on the left median

notable_agents.action: vehicle with headlights on approaching in the distance

entered.detail: tall palm tree on the highway median
large metal framework spanning the highway with signage

segments.scene_description: The highway continues with a palm tree visible on the left median as the camera approaches the city center. An overhead gantry structure looms ahead while power lines crisscross the sky. The distant skyline draws closer with its futuristic towers becoming more defined.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown highway under overhead sign structure with digital billboards

events.description: passing under the overhead gantry structure temporarily blocking sky view
white vehicle visible ahead navigating the highway

entered.detail: large digital screen with Japanese text and graphics on building facade
tall building with pink and red digital advertising displays
modern glass and steel towers forming the city center skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the overhead gantry structure into the dense urban core. Large digital billboards illuminate the surrounding modern glass skyscrapers with vibrant advertisements. The highway continues straight through the canyon of high-rise buildings as other vehicles navigate the road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection transitioning to residential encampment with market tents

events.description: road curves left passing large standalone billboard structure
entering lower-income area with yellow market tents and ruined buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through the intersection and entering a residential area with market tents and derelict structures

notable_agents.action: white car turning at the intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall standalone billboard structure with multiple advertising faces
large yellow canopy tent set up on the roadside
white canopy tent adjacent to the yellow tent
derelict concrete structures with broken walls and debris
large suspension bridge with tall towers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The road curves left past a large pillar billboard, transitioning from the commercial downtown into a more derelict residential zone. Yellow and white market tents line the left side of the road near ruined buildings, while a massive bridge structure becomes visible in the background. The modern skyscrapers recede into the left background as the environment becomes more industrial and worn.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey along an elevated highway that transforms from an industrial outskirts zone into a dense urban core and finally into a derelict residential district. It begins by passing a massive cylindrical industrial structure under a clear golden hour sky, with power lines stretching toward a distant skyline. As the camera approaches the city center, the view opens up past median palm trees and under a looming overhead gantry, bringing the futuristic towers into sharp focus. The scene then plunges into a canyon of modern glass skyscrapers illuminated by vibrant digital billboards before the road curves left, shifting the environment from commercial luxury to a worn landscape of ruined buildings and yellow market tents. Finally, the sleek skyscrapers recede into the background as the camera moves toward a massive bridge structure in an increasingly industrial and decayed zone.
